description: In August 2023, Zoom Video Communications mandated a return-to-office (RTO) for employees living within 50 miles of an office. The policy sparked internal dissent and broader debate about the hypocrisy of companies selling remote-work tools while demanding office presence.

key_events.description: Zoom CEO Eric Yuan announces mandatory 2-day office hybrid policy.
Tech media reports widespread internal employee dissatisfaction and backlash.
External experts criticize the performative nature of RTO in the video-conferencing sector.
Policy is fully implemented as leadership holds firm despite public perception loss.

calibration_notes: Measures the impact of institutional hypocrisy on public opinion regarding labor policies.
